epk2extract.default: set PATH=C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin;%PATH% && if not exist build mkdir build && clang -c -O0 -g -Iinclude -Isrc src\stream\tsfile.c -o build\tsfile.obj && clang -c -O0 -g -Iinclude -Isrc src\epk1.c -o build\epk1.obj && (clang -c -O0 -g -Iinclude -Isrc src\pkg.c -o build\pkg.obj || clang -c -O0 -g -Iinclude -Isrc src\mediatek_pkg.c -o build\pkg.obj) && clang -c -O0 -g -Iinclude -Isrc src\main.c -o build\main.obj

mbed_os.default: mkdir build 2>nul & C:\PROGRA~1\LLVM\bin\clang.exe -D_DEBUG -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrtd -g -Xclang -gcodeview -I. -Iplatform -Iplatform/include -Istorage -Istorage/kvstore/securestore/include -Istorage/kvstore/kvstore_global_api/include -Iconnectivity -Iconnectivity/drivers/cellular/framework/API -Iconnectivity/lorawan/include -Iconnectivity/lorawan/include/lorawan -Iconnectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/wsf/include -Iconnectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/ble-host/include -Iconnectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/ble-host/sources/stack/att -Iconnectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/ble-host/sources/stack/l2c -Iconnectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/ble-host/sources/stack/cfg -Itargets -Ihal/include -Idrivers/include -MD -MT build\coverity_probe.obj -MF build\coverity_probe.d -o build\coverity_probe.obj -c connectivity/FEATURE_BLE/libraries/cordio_stack/ble-host/sources/stack/att/att_eatt.c

raylib.default: set PATH=C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin;%PATH% && if exist build rmdir /s /q build && cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=C:/Users/EXTmdamas/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe/ninja.exe -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF -DBUILD_GAMES=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build
